response.justification: Candidate is significantly overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with 15+ years of experience including Staff and Senior titles. Strong technical fit on TypeScript, React, Node.js, and relevant infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker). Main risks are seniority mismatch, retention/salary expectations, and PostgreSQL listed only via generic SQL (recent stacks lean on MongoDB). Berlin location aligns with the on-site requirement. Worth an interview to assess motivation for an entry-level position and explore role calibration.
strengths: Strong fullstack stack match: TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker
Berlin-based, supporting the high on-site presence requirement
Demonstrated learning ability, teaching/workshops, and craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Heavily overqualified — Staff/Senior background versus an entry-level IC role
Limited explicit PostgreSQL experience; recent DB work is MongoDB-centric
No visible exposure to Nest.js or the renewable-energy/construction domain
